recommendations.title: Caught by a Wave
recommendations.overview: A summer fling born under the Sicilian sun quickly develops into a heartbreaking love story that forces a boy and girl to grow up too quickly.

recommendations.title: Digimon Adventure: Last Evolution Kizuna
recommendations.overview: Tai is now a university student, living alone, working hard at school, and working every day, but with his future still undecided. Meanwhile, Matt and others continue to work on Digimon incidents and activities that help people with their partner Dig

recommendations.title: Bad Influence
recommendations.overview: An ex-con gets a fresh start when hired to protect a wealthy heiress from a stalker — but their chemistry is hard to resist as they grow closer.

recommendations.title: Jackie & Ryan
recommendations.overview: A modern day train hopper fighting to be a successful musician and a single mom battling to maintain custody of her daughter defy their circumstances by coming together in a relationship that may change each other's lives forever.

recommendations.title: American Dreams in China
recommendations.overview: Three Chinese friends build a successful English language school to help Chinese teenagers fulfil their dreams.

recommendations.title: The Restless
recommendations.overview: Leila and Damien are deeply in love. Despite his bipolar disorder, he tries to pursue his life with her, knowing he may never be able to offer her what she desires.

recommendations.title: Aashiqui 2
recommendations.overview: A young woman meets a failing musician who launches her singing career, but their relationship is doomed when people assume he's with her for her fame and fortune.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: El man del porno
recommendations.overview: When Carlos Andrés decides that the best way to contribute to his family is to become a porn actor, the only problem is that his girlfriend does not know about his successful career.
